description: cell ridges around a complex 11-cell 'snake' merge — multi-tooth regression gate for the tooth-tip rounding work. The group has three tooth walls, including an asymmetric one between cols 3-4 in row 1 where one end is a true tooth tip and the other end attaches to the group's outer perimeter (3-cells-in-group at that junction). This exercises both the rounded tooth-tip case and the asymmetric not-a-tooth-tip case in a single render.

steps.label: ridge wraps multiple teeth in a complex snake-shaped merge
